results.title: Choosing the Right Heat Sinks for Efficient Cooling - Boyd | Trusted ...
results.snippet: Main heat sink components include a base and a series of fins made from high thermal conductivity materials like aluminum or copper. By carrying heat to the surrounding air, heat sinks ensure high thermal performance and prevent system failure or damage.

results.title: Heat Sink Extrusions | Advanced Thermal Solutions
results.snippet: The ratio of tall, straight fins to their small footprint base improves thermal performance and saves space. The extruded aluminum minimizes thermal resistance, reduces weight and saves cost over alternative (e.g. copper) heat sinks.
